input.command: kubectl -n ray get deployments; echo "---pods---"; kubectl -n ray get pods; echo "---worker spec---"; kubectl -n ray get deployment ray-worker -o yaml | sed -n '/containers:/,/restartPolicy\|^status:/p'

content.content:

ray-head     1/1     1            1           15m
ray-worker   2/2     1            2           14m
---pods---
NAME                          READY   STATUS              RESTARTS   AGE
ray-client                    1/1     Running             0          16m
ray-head-c6bc9886f-9mkh6      1/1     Running             0          8m59s
ray-worker-67f5d84898-d4fbg   1/1     Running             0          8m3s

ray-worker-76bdcd9bf7-j5k8t   0/1     ContainerCreating   0          15s
---worker spec---
      containers:
      - args:
        - ray start --address=ray-head:6379 --block
        command:
        - sh
        - -c
        - |
          ray start --address=ray-head:6379 --node-ip-address="${MY_POD_IP}" --num-cpus=1 --block --bad-flag
        image: rayproject/ray:2.9.0
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: ray-worker
        readinessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
            - ray
            - status
          failureThreshold: 3
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 10
          successThreshold: 1
          timeoutSeconds: 30
        resources: {}
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always

input.command:
kubectl -n ray get pods -l app.kubernetes.io/component=worker
echo "---logs---"
for p in $(kubectl -n ray get pods -l app.kubernetes.io/component=worker -o name); do echo "== $p =="; kubectl -n ray logs $p --tail=30 2>&1; done
